name: chat-sdk
description: Unified chat abstraction for Slack, Teams, Google Chat, and Discord (CJS+ESM fork)

scripts.build:validate: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-mock SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET=mock TEAMS_APP_ID=mock TEAMS_APP_PASSWORD=mock TEAMS_APP_TENANT_ID=mock GOOGLE_CHAT_CREDENTIALS='{"type":"service_account","project_id":"mock","private_key":"-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----\nMOCK\n-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----","client_email":"mock@mock.iam.gserviceaccount.com"}' REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 RECORDING_ENABLED=false turbo build
scripts.validate: pnpm knip && pnpm check && turbo typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build:validate
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm build && pnpm build:root && pnpm build:dts
